title: leptonychia urophylla
intro: Leptonychia urophylla, also known as the "hairy leaf" or "cushion bush," is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a shrub native to tropical Africa, commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and triterpenoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Leptonychia urophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, offering potential health benefits including pain relief, wound healing, and immune system support.
